architecture.summary: Mock auth system with register, login, and profile endpoints. In-memory storage, fake JWT tokens.
decisions: In-memory Map instead of database for mock simplicity
Fake JWT (base64) instead of real JWT — mock only
localStorage for token persistence between tabs

files.content:
# Plan: Mock Auth System

## Этапы
- [x] Architect: архитектура готова
- [x] Backend: API реализован
- [x] Frontend: UI готов
- [x] QA: тесты составлены
- [x] Code Review: пройден

## Архитектура
In-memory auth, 3 endpoints, fake JWT

# UI Components

## LoginForm.vue
- Fields: username, password
- API: POST /login
- On success: save token, redirect to Dashboard

## RegisterForm.vue
- Fields: username, password, confirm
- API: POST /register
- On success: show message, redirect to Login

# Test Cases

- TC-01: Register new user → 201
- TC-02: Register duplicate → 409
- TC-03: Login valid → 200 + token
- TC-04: Login invalid password → 401
- TC-05: GET /me with token → 200
- TC-06: GET /me without token → 401

# Review

## Backend
- ✅ In-memory storage for mock
- ⚠️ Plain text password (ok for mock)

## Frontend
- ✅ Clean component separation
- ⚠️ No XSS escaping (low risk for mock)

## Вердикт
✅ APPROVED

logs.architect: Выбрал in-memory Map для простоты mock. Fake JWT вместо real — не нужно подписывать. Три endpoints: register, login, me.
logs.backend: Реализовал три endpoints на Express. Валидация полей. In-memory storage. Генерация fake-jwt токена.
logs.frontend: Создал Vue 3 компоненты: App, LoginForm, RegisterForm, Dashboard. localStorage для токена. Базовая валидация форм.
logs.qa: Составил 6 тест-кейсов. Проверил register, login, me. Edge cases: пустые поля, неверные credentials.
logs.reviewer: Backend: in-memory ok, plain text password ⚠️. Frontend: компоненты чистые, XSS риск ⚠️. Вердикт: APPROVED для mock.
